TRANSFORM_EXPRESSION: CASE WHEN MODIFIEDDATE > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() THEN NULL ELSE MODIFIEDDATE END

CASE WHEN PERSONID IS NOT NULL AND STOREID IS NULL THEN 'PERSON' WHEN PERSONID IS NULL AND STOREID IS NOT NULL THEN 'STORE' WHEN PERSONID IS NULL AND STOREID IS NULL THEN 'NOT_APPLICABLE' WHEN PERSONID IS NOT NULL AND STOREID IS NOT NULL THEN 'INVALID' END
